title: Gamera vs. Viras
original_title: ガメラ対宇宙怪獣バイラス
overview: As alien invaders plot to conquer the Earth, two Boy Scouts steal a mini-submarine and discover Gamera in their midst. Transported to the alien's spaceship, the Scouts are menaced by the evil inhabitants, including Viras, a squid-like monster that grows to colossal size to battle Gamera.

trailers.title: Gamera gegen Viras - Frankensteins Weltraummonster greift an ≣ 1968 ≣ Trailer
